title: Assignment
description: An assignment definition stored in assignments/<id>.yml within a PXL Classroom control repository.

id.description: URL-safe slug uniquely identifying the assignment.

description.description: Optional longer description of the assignment.

organization.description: GitHub organization that owns this assignment.

template.description: Source template repository used to create student repos.

owner.description: Owner (user or org) of the template repository.

repository_id.description: Immutable GitHub repository ID of the template. Set once on first use.

repository_name_pattern.description: Naming pattern for student repositories. Must contain {github_login}.

opens_at.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the assignment opens for acceptance.

timezone.description: IANA timezone used for display and scheduling. Defaults to Europe/Brussels.

submission_ref.description: Git ref considered as the submission branch.

student_permission.description: Permission level granted to the student on their repository.

acceptance_mode.description: How student repos are created: self-service (star event) or pre-provisioned.

late_policy.description: What happens on late submissions: report only, or block pushes.

max_acceptances.description: Optional guardrail limiting the number of accepted students.

lock_down_enabled.description: Whether to lock down student repos after the deadline.
